seo.title: Blacklisted Addresses
seo.description: What blacklisted addresses are on {{explorerName}}, why a fraud alert is displayed, and how and why accounts become blacklisted.

intro: Fraud can occur on {{explorerName}}, just like on any other blockchain, so users must remain vigilant.

safety.verify: Always verify the authenticity of any website, wallet, or transaction request.
safety.keys: Never share your secret keys or phrases.
safety.scams: Exercise caution regarding scams that promise high returns, offer free {{nativeCurrency}} giveaways, or impersonate trusted entities.
safety.tools: If you're uncertain about a transaction or website, use reliable tools to verify the details and protect your assets.

fraudAlert: On our website, accounts marked with a "Fraud Alert" are flagged as potentially involved in scams, phishing, or other malicious activities. These accounts are highlighted to warn users before they interact with them.
warning: We strongly recommend proceeding with caution when engaging with flagged accounts to ensure the safety of your assets.
reasonsIntro: Accounts may be flagged with a Fraud Alert if they:

reasons.scams: Are associated with scams, such as giveaway scams.
reasons.spam: Send spam transactions or behave maliciously in some way.

sources: We can flag accounts ourselves based on objective user reports or receive fraud alerts through our partners' APIs.
